summary: iter55.32 — Full E2E validation of Capital Request feature + Admin User Stats page. Backend: 14/14 pytest cases pass, including CREATE/LIST role-gating (403 for NORMAL_TOKEN mentions 'VIP'), 400 on unknown currency, 422 on short reason, approve credits vip_balance + records debt_original/debt_remaining/discount_pct, reject locks status + saves reject_reason (no balance move + re-approve blocked with 400), auto-discount hook in accumulate_vip_balance handles (a) partial paydown 500→470 with 30 USDT event, (b) paid_off cap at remaining debt, (c) FIFO across two active debts (older paid_off first, remainder to newer), (d) currency-scope isolation (USDT debt vs CUP order → debt untouched, CUP credited 100%). Admin /users/{id}/stats returns all expected keys with net_position direction=client_owes_platform when debt > balance, 404 on unknown user. Adjacent regression clean (44/44 across iter55.29/30 + accumulate_idempotent + balance_ledger). Frontend: (1) /admin/users table has simplified single-column USDT balance (no per-currency breakdown), 40 user-stats-btn-* buttons present, click navigates to /admin/users/{id}/stats. (2) AdminUserStatsPage renders admin-user-stats-page, user-stats-net-position, all 3 KPIs, user-stats-capital-section, user-stats-back-btn (returns to /admin/users), user-stats-goto-users-btn, user-stats-goto-requests-btn. user-stats-balances-grid renders only when user has ≥1 balance (verified on user_test_vip01) — this is a conditional render, not a bug. (3) /admin/company-funds?tab=requests renders admin-capital-requests + cr-filter-status (5 status options). After VIP creates a request, admin sees cr-approve-{id} + cr-reject-{id}; approve dialog exposes cr-approve-discount + cr-approve-notes + cr-approve-confirm; reject dialog exposes cr-reject-reason + cr-reject-confirm. TOTP is handled via a secondary prompt (handleTotpError → TotpDialog) on 401 from server — not shown up-front. (4) VIP sidebar has nav-capital-requests (only for role=vip), /dashboard/capital-requests renders vip-capital-requests-view; new-request dialog has amount/currency/reason/return-date/submit; happy-path submit shows success toast 'Solicitud enviada. El equipo la revisará pronto.' and the new item appears with status 'EN REVISIÓN' + amount + optional return date. End-to-end VIP→admin visibility loop confirmed live.
critical_code_review_comments: Approve/Reject dialogs do NOT surface TOTP input up-front; they rely on server 401 → then open a secondary TOTP dialog via handleTotpError. This works but adds a round trip and can feel like an unexpected re-prompt. Consider mirroring the inline TOTP pattern used in AdminOrders where TOTP is asked in the same dialog to reduce user friction.

AdminUserStatsPage renders user-stats-balances-grid ONLY if the user has ≥1 non-zero balance. Perfectly acceptable UX, but tests that assume the testid is always present will fail on empty-balance users. Keep the conditional but document it in the test contract (already handled in test_iter55_32).

Suggested future refactor: AdminCapitalRequests.jsx is ~370 lines with 2 dialogs and 1 filter — still manageable, but if we add 'edit' or 'reschedule' flows, split ApproveDialog/RejectDialog into subcomponents.

capital_requests.py backend: reject endpoint refuses re-approval (400) as designed. Good. Verify similarly that /approve is idempotent-safe if clicked twice within a short window (test file already covers status=disbursed protection via approved→re-approve returning 400 for a previously-rejected request; would be nice to also test approve→re-approve to lock in a 400 or 409).
test_credentials: Google-auth test sessions: ADMIN=test_session_admin_X, VIP=test_session_vip_X, NORMAL=test_session_normal_X. TOTP secret JBSWY3DPEHPK3PXPJBSWY3DPEHPK3PXP.
seed_data_creation: Test file (test_iter55_32_capital_requests.py) plants + cleans all capital_requests / orders / currencies / vip_balances for user_test_vip01. During the UI test I created 1 pending capital request via the VIP UI (250 USDT, reason 'Necesito capital operativo para atender clientes esta semana', return_date 2026-04-15) that remains in DB — main agent may want to clean it up or approve/reject it during their next iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-discount hook lives in services/balances.py accumulate_vip_balance — runs BEFORE the $inc to vip_balances so every credit path (P2P confirm, direct 'Completar', legacy backfill) is covered. Discount cap = oldest active debt's discount_pct × amount_to (not summed across debts). Currency scope is strict: debt.currency_code must equal order.to_code for the hook to fire. To seed a pending accumulate order for testing use the `_plant_and_accumulate` helper in test_iter55_32 (inserts into orders + PUTs /api/admin/orders/{id}/status). Frontend TOTP flow for admin approve/reject is a 401-retry pattern; expected behavior. UI residue from this iteration: 1 pending capital_request from user_test_vip01 (id starts with cr_).
rca of the issue: N/A — feature-addition iteration, zero defects found across backend + admin UI + VIP UI.
